methodsAttempted.notes: Official SBU homepage was reachable through the browser fetch path and confirmed official navigation to the news, education, research, library, and ICT subdomains.

methodsAttempted.query: site:sbu.ac.ir (ChatGPT OR "generative AI" OR "هوش مصنوعی مولد" OR "چت جی پی تی") (policy OR guideline OR students OR exams)

methodsAttempted.query: news.sbu.ac.ir هوش مصنوعی دانشگاه شهید بهشتی
methodsAttempted.notes: The official SBU news archive exposed an AI-related item about the opening ceremony for the Shahid Faghi specialized artificial intelligence center.
A course-level generative-AI guideline page was found on dbcs.ir. It links to an SBU faculty site but is not on an official SBU domain, so it was rejected as a public tracker source.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found an SBU official news-archive entry about an AI and data science center opening, but no official university-wide student, teaching, privacy, or academic-integrity policy for generative-AI use was located. A course-level external generative-AI guideline page was rejected because it is not hosted on an official SBU domain.

artifacts.queryUsed: news.sbu.ac.ir هوش مصنوعی دانشگاه شهید بهشتی

stopConditions: Stop after official SBU-domain source-status evidence is captured.
Do not use external course-level pages as official policy evidence.
Do not infer university-wide generative-AI rules from event listings or research-center announcements.

artifacts.title: Shahid Beheshti University (SBU) AI Policy Source Status
artifacts.summary: This staged crawl found official SBU-domain evidence of an AI and data-science center news item, but did not locate an official university-wide generative-AI use policy for students, teaching, privacy, or assessment. A course-level external generative-AI guideline page was rejected because it is not hosted on an official SBU domain.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Local direct TLS fetches to sbu.ac.ir failed in this worker with SSL EOF errors; the official SBU pages were inspected through the browser fetch path.
No claim in this bundle should be read as an SBU university-wide generative-AI use rule.
